name: agent-guard
description: Local-by-default, no-telemetry hooks inspect supported tool inputs, outputs, and changed files in every enabled Claude Code or Codex session to block or mask secret leaks. Includes opt-in PII filtering and Git/CI backstops.

interface.shortDescription: Real-time secret-leak guardrails for AI coding agents
interface.longDescription: Local-by-default, no-telemetry hooks inspect supported tool-call inputs, outputs, and changed files in every enabled Claude Code or Codex session. Agent Guard blocks risky `.env` reads, secret writes, and credential-dumping commands; masks secret-like tool output; and adds native Git-hook and GitHub Actions backstops. PII hook processing and HTTP providers are opt-in.
